content.text: I'll start by verifying cluster access and the StatefulSet, then gather the audit data.

input.command: kubectl -n cockroachdb get statefulset 2>&1; echo "---PODS---"; kubectl -n cockroachdb get pods 2>&1
input.description: List statefulset and pods in cockroachdb namespace

content.text: Cluster is up with 3 nodes. Let me gather all the audit data in parallel (read-only queries).

input.command:
echo "===== NODE STATUS ====="; kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- ./cockroach node status --insecure 2>&1
echo; echo "===== NON-DEFAULT CLUSTER SETTINGS ====="; kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- ./cockroach sql --insecure -e "SELECT variable, value FROM crdb_internal.cluster_settings WHERE value != default_value;" 2>&1
input.description: Get node status and non-default cluster settings

content.text: Now zone configs, GC TTL, replication factor, and cluster health.

input.command:
echo "===== ZONE CONFIGS ====="; kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- ./cockroach sql --insecure -e "SELECT target, raw_config_sql FROM crdb_internal.zones ORDER BY target;" 2>&1
echo; echo "===== DATABASES ====="; kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- ./cockroach sql --insecure -e "SHOW DATABASES;" 2>&1
echo; echo "===== sql.defaults SETTINGS ====="; kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- ./cockroach sql --insecure -e "SELECT variable, value, default_value FROM crdb_internal.cluster_settings WHERE variable LIKE 'sql.defaults%' AND value != default_value;" 2>&1
input.description: Get zone configs, databases, and sql.defaults overrides

description: Get zone configs, databases, and sql.defaults overrides

summary: Get zone configs, databases, and sql.defaults overrides

content.text: Let me check cluster health (under-replicated ranges) and confirm the snapshot rate default for context.

input.command:
echo "===== RANGE HEALTH ====="; kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- ./cockroach sql --insecure -e "SELECT sum((metrics->>'ranges')::int) AS ranges, sum((metrics->>'ranges.unavailable')::int) AS unavailable, sum((metrics->>'ranges.underreplicated')::int) AS underreplicated FROM crdb_internal.kv_store_status;" 2>&1
echo; echo "===== snapshot rate default ====="; kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- ./cockroach sql --insecure -e "SELECT variable, value, default_value FROM crdb_internal.cluster_settings WHERE variable IN ('kv.snapshot_rebalance.max_rate','kv.snapshot_recovery.max_rate');" 2>&1
echo; echo "===== existing configmap? ====="; kubectl -n cockroachdb get configmap config-audit 2>&1
input.description: Check range health, snapshot defaults, existing configmap

description: Check range health, snapshot defaults, existing configmap

summary: Check range health, snapshot defaults, existing configmap

content.content:

ranges	unavailable	underreplicated
69	0	66

kv.snapshot_rebalance.max_rate	1.0 MiB	32 MiB

content.text: All data gathered. Note: 66 of 69 ranges are under-replicated — expected, since system/meta/liveness zones request `num_replicas=5` but only 3 nodes exist. Now writing the report and creating the ConfigMap.
